title: goodenia neglecta
intro: Goodenia neglecta, also known as the 'native violet', is a small, herbaceous plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. The leaves and stems of Goodenia neglecta can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and wellbeing.
